sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3627" key="a)kro/puros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-πῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3627.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceedingly hot</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρύσταλλος</foreign> Olymp.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.76B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
